f=1 local g g=function(l)local n=0 local p=0 for t=0,3 do local u local v={}local function w(x,y)v[y]=x;return v[y]end local x={}x[1]=4 x[2]=0 x[3]=0 local x=-36443 repeat if x<=-36443 then u=e(l,f)n=r(n,s(u,8*t))x=v[x+65787]or w(67361,x+65787)else if x<=58106 then break else f=f+1 x=v[x+50115]or w(58106,x+50115)end end until x==58106 end;for t=0,3 do local l=e(l,f)p=r(p,s(l,8*t));f=f+1;end;return p*4294967296+n;end;local l l=function(n)local p=0 for t=0,3 do p=r(p,s(e(n,f,f),8*t));f=f+1;end;return p;end;local l l=function(n)local p=0 for t=0,2 do p=r(p,s(e(n,f,f),8*t));f=f+1;end;return p;end;local l l=function(n)local p=0 for t=0,1 do p=r(p,s(e(n,f,f),8*t));f=f+1;end;return p;end;local l l=function(n)local p local t={}local function u(v,w)t[w]=v;return t[w]end local v={}v[1]=0 v[2]=3 v[3]=3 local v=29365 repeat if v<=-27886 then break else if v<74016 then p=0 p=r(p,s(e(n,f,f),8))v=t[v+34178]or u(74016,v+34178)else f=f+1 return p;end end until v==-27886 end;local l l=function(n)local p local r={}local function s(t,u)local v=q(u,u)local t=t+v r[u]=t;return t end local t={}t[1]=1 t[2]=2 t[3]=1 local t=46659 repeat if t>=24990 then if t<=24990 then break else p=0 p=e(n,f)f=f+1 t=r[q(t,63967)]or s(-21586,q(t,63967))end else return p;end until t==24990 end;local n n=function(p)local r,s,t,u,v,w,x,y,z,ba,bb local bc={}local bd={}local function be(bf,bg)bd[bg]=bf;return bd[bg]end local bf={}bf[1]=2 bf[2]=2 bf[3]=3 local bf=74413 repeat if bf<=-33401 then if bf~=-33401 then break else bb=bb+2^52 return z*bb*2^(ba-1023-52);end else if bf~=74413 then bb=((x%16)*2^48+w*2^40+v*2^32+u*2^24+t*2^16+s*2^8+r)if ba==0 then if bb==0 then return z*0;else return z*bb*2^(-1022-52);end;elseif ba==2047 then if bb==0 then return z*(1/0);else return 0/0;end;end;bf=bd[bf+94858]or be(-33401,bf+94858)else r,s,t,u,v,w,x,y=e(p,f,f+7)f=f+8 bc[3]=y>127 and-1 or 1 z=bc[3]ba=(y%128)*16+h(x/16)bf=bd[bf+76563]or be(58419,bf+76563)end end until bf==-40452 end;local p p=function(r)local s,t local u={}local function v(w,x)local y=q(x,x)local w=w+y u[x]=w;return w end local w={}w[1]=4 w[2]=3 w[3]=4 local w=-38835 repeat if w>=39258 then if w<67559 then break else repeat local r=e(r,f,f)s=s+(r>127 and r-128 or r)*t t=t*128 f=f+1 until(r<128)return s end else s=0 t=1 w=u[q(w,83398)]or v(67559,q(w,83398))end until w==39258 end local q q=function(r)local s,t local u={}local function v(w,x)u[x]=w;return u[x]end local w={}w[1]=1 w[2]=1 w[3]=1 local w=74500 repeat if w<=-20111 then break else if w<=61495 then return-t-1;else s=p(r)t=h(s/2)if(s%2)==0 then return t;end;w=u[w+73281]or v(61495,w+73281)end end until w==-20111 end;local h h=function(r)local s,t,u,v local w={}local function x(y,z)w[z]=y;return w[z]end local y={}y[1]=0 y[2]=3 y[3]=1 local y=41561 repeat if y<=32954 then return((v*16777216)+(u*65536)+(t*256)+s);else if y==41561 then s,t,u,v=e(r,f,f+3)f=f+4 y=w[y+45065]or x(32954,y+45065)else break end end until y==74571 end;local r r=function(s)local e,s=e(s,f,f+1)f=f+2;return((s*256)+e);end;local e e=function(s)local t,u local v={}local function w(x,y)v[y]=x;return v[y]end local x={}x[1]=0 x[2]=0 x[3]=3 local x=85129 repeat if x>=76372 then if x<=76372 then break else t=h(s)u=h(s)if u==0 then return t;elseif(u>=2147483648)then u=u-4294967296;end;x=v[x+26986]or w(47603,x+26986)end else return u*4294967296+t;end until x==76372 end;local h h=function(s)local t={[7118]={},[8104]={},[2064]={},[7388]={},[5921]={},[4688]={},[7720]={},}do t[7646]=p(s);end local u=p(s)local v={}do for w=0,u-1 do local u=l(s)if u==0 then local x x=l(s)if not((x)~=(0))then local x,y local z={}local function ba(bb,bc)z[bc]=bb;return z[bc]end local bb={}bb[1]=2 bb[2]=0 bb[3]=1 local bb=24435 repeat if bb>=24435 then if bb<30423 then x=nil x=p(s)bb=z[bb+83421]or ba(30423,bb+83421)else y=nil y=b(s,f,f+x-1)bb=z[bb+72066]or ba(-17810,bb+72066)end else if bb~=-15962 then f=f+x i[403]==44 then f[i[3086]]=#f[i[8465]];elseif i[403]==3 then local a=i[8465]local a=g[a]f[i[3086]]=a[1]else f[i[3086]]=#f[i[8465]];end end end else if bd<=19 then if bd<=18 then local a=i[3086]f[a]={f[a]}else do return end end else if bd<=21 then if bd<=20 then f[i[3086]]=l[q[i[8465]]];else local a=i[3086]local b=u[v]u[v]=nil v=v-1 local c=u[v]u[v]=nil v=v-1 local g=u[v]u[v]=nil bb=bb+1;end;end;end;local a=h(d)local a=e(a,{},j())return a();end)(error,next,string.match,tonumber,string.gsub,string.sub,table.insert,string.char,string.byte,coroutine.yield,coroutine.wrap,string.rep,table.concat,math.floor,select,(getfenv or function()return _ENV;end),setmetatable,next,(table.unpack or unpack),(table.pack or function(...)return{...};end),math.min,(function(b)if b<=1 then return false end;if b<=3 then return true end;if b%2==0 or b%3==0 then return false end;local c=5;while c*c<=b do if b%c==0 or b%(c+2)==0 then return false end;c=c+6 end;return true end),string.len,table.remove,table.sort,(string.unpack),string.gmatch,string.find,string.reverse,tostring,math.abs,rawget,string.format);
